description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a sharply sloped gable roof and a geometric facade. The front elevation displays a covered porch area with multiple vertical supports and a set of steps leading up to the entryway. The exterior is finished in a striking monochrome palette, with large, dark window panels arranged in a row along the rear and side walls. The roof is composed of two intersecting planes, creating a dynamic, layered appearance. The structure appears to be a single-story dwelling with a compact footprint, suitable for an urban neighborhood. Minimal decorative elements and clean lines emphasize its contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, single-story house with a sharply sloped gable roof, geometric lines, and a monochrome exterior featuring large window panels and a covered front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, entry steps, and vertical supports, with angular roof lines and some window detail.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dramatic slope of the roof and the solid, windowless side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a row of large, dark windows and the intersecting roof planes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the roof's layered structure and the steps leading up to the porch.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, vertical supports, and a simple main door
